notes: Default gameplay profile. Generate a fresh source strip with at least one full frame of empty space between neighboring visible poses before cleanup/repack. Expand source canvas width and gutters instead of shrinking poses.

Expanded action profile for large body motion, weapons, wings, tails, leaps, spells, flashes, and special effects. Use one fixed scale across the job. Expand source canvas width and gutters when spacing is tight.

Medium monster gameplay profile. Use for monsters about 2 times character size. Before cleanup/repack, verify at least 256px empty source spacing between every neighboring visible pose. Expand source canvas width; do not shrink the monster.

Medium monster expanded action profile. Use for 2x monsters with large attacks, spells, wings, tails, leaps, flashes, and special effects. Before cleanup/repack, verify at least 768px empty source spacing between every neighboring visible pose. Expand source canvas width; do not shrink the monster.

Large monster gameplay profile. Use for monsters about 3 times character size. Before cleanup/repack, verify at least 384px empty source spacing between every neighboring visible pose. Expand source canvas width; do not shrink the monster.

Large monster expanded action profile. Use for 3x monsters with large attacks, spells, wings, tails, leaps, flashes, and special effects. Before cleanup/repack, verify at least 1152px empty source spacing between every neighboring visible pose. Expand source canvas width; do not shrink the monster.
